reason: Verify §1.5a was updated in the same change set (Rule 10): the complete-draft promotion is documented, auto_parse/auto_goal still noted as intentionally absent. No code↔spec drift on the objective router topology.

Verify Part 1b matches §3c-user-initiated: handle_objective_confirm resolves the pending objective decision in the same tx via the CAS; after a direct /objective/confirm the snapshot has no phantom pending objective (AC3).
Verify the objective FormRequestedEvent contract is unchanged — the router-promoted form emits the identical ObjectiveConfirmAction the FE already consumes (no accidental contract drift).

Cross-check the implementation against the CC sibling: shape-1 only (no Mind call), incomplete draft still narrates (AC2), prose-only complete draft promotes (AC1). Consistency authority for both children.
